features: 7 Day Portable Pill Box: 2 times a day, 7 days a week, our pill box simply collate once from Monday to Sunday to better track your medication for a whole week.
Product Size: 10.3 x 4.5 x 2.5 cm, The size of each small compartments is 4.5cm, small enough to fit in your pocket or bag, easy to carry when you travel or do outdoor activities.
Durable Material: The pill box made of high quality food grade plastic, the medicine that protects you, keeping your medicines safe and in order.
Travel Pill Case: Compact and lightweight, this portable pill box is ideal for home and travel use, with a lid to keep your medication clean. easy to carry when out and about without taking up space.
Widely Use: This pill box has a large enough capacity to hold the largest pills with extra space. You can also store small jewellery items such as earrings, beads, nail art pieces etc.
description: Product description 2Pcs Weekly Pill Box Organiser, 7 Day Travel Pill Box, 2 Times a Day Clear and Black Small Medicine Storage Box, Separate 7 Compartments with Lids, for Travel Pill Case 7 Day Portable Pill Box 2 times a day, 7 days a week, our pill box simply collate once from Monday to Sunday to better track your medication for a whole week. Widely Use This pill box has a large enough capacity to hold the largest pills with extra space. You can also store small jewellery items such as earrings, beads, nail art pieces etc. Specifications: Material: Plastic Color: as the picture shown Size: as the picture shown Package includes: 2 pcs Pill Box Organiser Note: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist slight difference due to different screen display. Directions Fill the appropriate compartments with the required medication for each day and time. Press the lids firmly to ensure they are secure. Carry the pill box with you or store it in a safe place. Take the medication as directed by your healthcare professional. Safety Warning Keep away from children and individuals with a tendency to put small objects in their mouths. See more
